primary_intent: NVTS FY2026 Q1 earnings analysis package with peer verification
routing_basis: Earnings-event package with peer verification and event-impact framing; serves as the canonical earnings/event golden few-shot example case.
routing_mismatch_risk: Low — scope is an earnings package, not a live trade call; actionability stays research-bound pending live refresh.
expected_output_package: earnings-analysis.md, financial-snapshot.csv, peer-comparison.csv, evidence-log.csv, expectation-map.csv, actionability-bridge.md
followup_questions: Should AI data-center content-per-MW (customer qualification + production-ramp evidence) become the tracked core variable on the expectation map? (Rung B -> consensus proxy / evidence path)
If Distributor A concentration (59% of revenue, 58% of receivables) rises again in Q2, thesis downgrade or watch item? (Rung C -> thesis_state falsification line)
Before live use after Q2 2026 (stale_after 2026-08-29), refresh backlog/design-win quantification first or cash-burn moderation? (Rung A -> boundary / readiness_level)
